---
title: "Biostatistical Topics"
code-copy: hover
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
    canonical: true
---

{{< include ../_tool-chooser.md >}}

### Short Course

-   [2025 RISW: Targeted learning for randomized controlled trials and hybrid studies in the era of artificial intelligence and machine learning](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Ozrp78LpPpuoogotRRorNRW9t-xb7PRu/view?usp=drive_link)
-   [2025 RISW: Targeted Learning - Addressing challenges to efficient, unbiased estimation in a regulatory context](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tAW0qjdqRuIZKp5RJDN6WFBB0Ao60pMy/view?usp=drive_link)
